Class AnthropicProvider

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.AbstractAiProvider
uno.anahata.asi.anthropic.AnthropicProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
Direct Known Subclasses:
MinimaxAnthropicProvider
public class AnthropicProvider extends AbstractAiProvider
Provider implementation for the official Anthropic API.
Author:
anahata

    private String
    anthropicVersion
    The forced Anthropic API version header (e.g., '2023-06-01').

    The HTTP client used for communication. transient to avoid serialization.

  • Field Details

    • anthropicVersion

      private String anthropicVersion
      The forced Anthropic API version header (e.g., '2023-06-01').

    • httpClient

      private transient HttpClient httpClient
      The HTTP client used for communication. transient to avoid serialization.

  • Constructor Details

    • AnthropicProvider

      public AnthropicProvider()
      Constructs a default AnthropicProvider.

    • AnthropicProvider

      public AnthropicProvider(String uuid, String displayName, String baseUrl, String anthropicVersion, String keysAcquisitionUri)
      Constructs an AnthropicProvider with explicit registration metadata.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the unique provider identifier.
      displayName - the human-readable display name.
      baseUrl - the target API base URL.
      anthropicVersion - the API version header value.
      keysAcquisitionUri - the console settings keys URI.

  • Method Details

    • getHttpClient

      public HttpClient getHttpClient()
      Lazily initializes and returns the HTTP client.
      Returns:
      The active HTTP client.

    • createRequestBuilder

      public HttpRequest.Builder createRequestBuilder(String endpoint)
      Creates a pre-configured request builder with standard Anthropic headers.
      Parameters:
      endpoint - The API endpoint (e.g., 'messages').
      Returns:
      A new HttpRequest.Builder.

    • listModels

      public List<? extends AbstractModel> listModels()
      Fetches the list of all models available from the provider's API. This method is intended to be called by the caching mechanism.

      Implementation details: Fetches available models from the Anthropic-compatible endpoint. Note that official Anthropic models are typically static, but this discovery allows for dynamic compatibility with Anthropic-compatible proxies (like MiniMax or local routers).

      Specified by:
      listModels in class AbstractAiProvider
      Returns:
      A list of provider-specific AbstractModel objects.

    • getApiKeyHint

      public String getApiKeyHint()
      Description copied from class: AbstractAiProvider
      Gets a template or hint string to display when the API keys file is empty.
      Specified by:
      getApiKeyHint in class AbstractAiProvider
      Returns:
      The API key hint text.

    • isRetryable

      public boolean isRetryable(int statusCode, String responseBody)
      Determines if an HTTP status code represents a retryable error.
      Parameters:
      statusCode - The HTTP status code.
      responseBody - The response body.
      Returns:
      true if the request should be retried.

    • hokusPocus

      public void hokusPocus()
      Description copied from class: AbstractAiProvider
      Resets the internal state of the provider, typically to force a key rotation.

      Implementation details: Subclasses should override this method to nullify their native API clients, ensuring they are reconstructed with the next available key from the pool.

      Overrides:
      hokusPocus in class AbstractAiProvider
